heroSubtitle: Access support, resources and tools for OBH Software clients
intro: Welcome to the OBH Software client area. Use the links below to access project resources, schedule consultations or get in touch with our team.

items.title: Book a Consultation
items.description: Schedule a free consultation to discuss your project, explore new ideas or review your technology roadmap.

items.title: Email Support
items.description: Send an email to our team for project enquiries, support requests or general questions.

items.title: Project Resources
items.description: Access documentation, guides and templates to support your technology projects.

items.title: Insights & Blog
items.description: Read our latest thoughts on technology, innovation and industry trends.

emergencySupport.title: Need Urgent Support?
emergencySupport.description: If you have an urgent project issue or need immediate assistance, don't hesitate to reach out directly.
instructions: Describe the issue and affected systems
We'll respond as quickly as possible
emergencySupport.note: For project emergencies and critical issues. For general enquiries, please use the contact form.

resources.title: Client Resources
resources.description: Helpful guides and documentation for OBH Software clients.
